query: I have an existing 3-year-old security tooling repo. It has source code, a README, a license, but no SECURITY.md, no VDP, no threat model, and no gitleaks. I want you to scaffold the security artifacts on top of it.
expected_behavior: Refuses to run the full greenfield scaffold over the existing project (does NOT overwrite README, LICENSE, or existing structure without warning)
Explains the risk of bulk-scaffolding (overwrite of existing artifacts, conflict with existing license, missing baseline gitleaks scan of historical commits)

Suggests incremental adoption (add SECURITY.md, VDP.md, THREAT-MODEL.md, and pre-commit hooks individually; run a baseline gitleaks scan against history first) instead of running the full 10-step scaffold blindly
